items.title: Supreme Court refuses to entertain plea seeking CBI probe into ‘extra-judicial’ killing of Bharat Tiwari
items.summary: A Bench headed by Justice M.M. Sundresh asked the petitioner, advocate Vishal Tiwari, to approach the Patna High Court for appropriate relief

items.title: Heavy security in South Africa as anti-migrant protesters take to the streets
items.summary: Thousands of people have left South Africa ahead of Tuesday's deadline set by anti-migrant groups.
